textByHash.2821757a0653cae7058c5d36b46ff59407efe484: Adventurer? I am no mere Adventurer, I am Andros Mai, brother of the Holy Order of Saradomin. You would do well to greet me with respect.
textByHash.45944a4c6f33f0d9bb8fb6b762a40ef51674d3c2: I wouldn't have expected someone of your... stature to know of me.
textByHash.daa7a9840b936fd858c7368443583feed29252e7: Tell me, what do you know of the vile Vet'ion?
textByHash.eda53059cfa2041e90ecea0ddee8f81154df5a71: You challenged him and came out unscathed? Impossible.
textByHash.ede23fce47d006f69c926c97e3d7ff057cff2d30: Vet'ion was a devout follower of the heretical god Zamorak. It is the will of my order and my duty as a follower of the true god Saradomin to end his tyranny.
textByHash.2e8b296aa1a8120788cf0db4804c4a56e8cd4087: After many years in my order's libraries, I stumbled upon an old tome which mentioned Vet'ion's final resting place, which I believe to be his source of power.
textByHash.d9164c2a8c3d26bd48074e198dd2b521ceb8dde1: His very existence is an insult to my lord Saradomin and I will not suffer it to exist any longer.
textByHash.ab29394993d70bf7695d159b5f4fef38709f99de: I have no fear of Vet'ion!
textByHash.38aec62a247e1a0f5c571d585405781254037476: I am merely meditating and preparing for the battle. I need to focus my mind before going out to find his resting place.
textByHash.e3b6f80bd2cf2de4e881df7a4aeb3de252d781dc: This conversation is over! Leave me before I lose my temper.
textByHash.aba53587e82fad73ad4f53247b76eddeaca66807: By Saradomin! That's a Zamorakian made chainmace you have there!
textByHash.ce45d5aa00bdaec3e36685c10d263cbeeadcc95f: I know melee weapons in general. Well enough to know most of them can be upgraded.
textByHash.6208edf594f104206d84aa3aad73daad7c4f3f8a: Perhaps with something sharp to give it more impact as it swings around.
textByHash.b9914506572c834689e8aeb39acb83200fdc0d47: They look like powerful claws. You could probably attach them to a weapon to make the weapon stronger.
textByHash.b381d473b02619722b9528fc7939986b8759ef93: Yes. Those look like they could be attached to the weapon.
textByHash.9f5fc1e9a08806042cde21a0006a1c5f2e6c6f80: While I could, I'd really not like to.
textByHash.ca8c1aa9ff549869e63dde5929a6a2c307d42119: And my supplies are running low...
textByHash.cb04ee8d1b4acae1979bc38859c14b7cf2acd667: Fine. But I want 500,000 coins for that. No less.
textByHash.b72ad81f5b04411db693423b39583f5327d83927: Feel free to come back when you do.
textByHash.d93e0add4f309f157fd99c89502566741a1a948a: No. I'm afraid not. They just look like fangs.
textByHash.1de0eb724ff054616ebf1749c7117d584a916c54: Perhaps not. I've seen that Derse Venator guy over there handle similar items. Perhaps he knows more.
textByHash.a32c67d5eff62d8151d5d66de63c54eeccb36c80: That's him! The vile Vet'Ion. I should like to smash this skull!
textByHash.d15f3acbf297ef0f8269e64ed09c44bce0bb2a22: The only thing his skull would be useful for is Zamorakian heresy. I won't stand for it!
textByHash.6d91b25c34f8134d02da25f3c2701c8898a9d3d6: Do you see Phabelle over there? Despite her questionable morals, she's my friend.
textByHash.06b373a89a0118183ff0a3bce6e17c10fb53b034: She's good with magic and may know how to take advantage of the powers in that skull.
textByHash.e21c6f172a471261cbdcf8b7b27cde91c430caa8: Downstairs you can find Madam Sikaro. Though she's on the wrong path, perhaps she could assist you.
